2605.21974.title: Format-Constraint Coupling in Knowledge Graph Construction from Statistical Tables
2605.21974.paper_summary: An extraction schema should not reduce knowledge graph fidelity. On statistical CSV, however, it can. We study country-by-year time-series matrices, a common layout on open-data portals. In this setting, serialization format and schema constraints interact super-additively. Their joint effect exceeds the sum of independent effects by up to +1.180 (2x2 factorial, 6 datasets). Bootstrap 95% CIs are strictly positive on 4/6 datasets, with strongest evidence on wide Type-II matrices. More critically, a schema applied to a mismatched format can trigger catastrophic mismatch. Fact coverage falls below the unconstrained baseline on 4/6 datasets through entity inflation or extraction refusal. We call this observed pattern format-constraint coupling. Probing and token ablation support a surface-form anchoring explanation centred on column-name references. Controlled variants across format-schema pairings, GraphRAG hosts, and LLM families show the same direction within the measured scope; one LLM family shows only partial activation. The observation also has a diagnostic consequence. Three standard retrieval modes largely mask construction quality (delta <= 1pp), whereas direct graph access exposes gaps up to +47.6pp (p < 0.0001). To support fidelity-aware evaluation, we release CSVFidelity-Bench. It contains 15 datasets, 11 Type-II matrices, 4 Type-III tables, and 1,892 Gold Standard facts across 6 domains.
2605.21974.paper_summary_zh: 一個抽取架構不應降低知識圖譜的保真度。然後，在統計CSV上，它可以。我們研究按年分國家的時間序列矩陣，這是在開放數據平台上常見的佈局。在這種情況下，序列化格式和架構約束以超加性互動。它們的聯合效應超過獨立效應的總和，最高可達+1.180（2x2因子，6個數據集）。自助法95%置信區間在4/6個數據集上嚴格為正，對於寬型II矩陣的證據最為強烈。更關鍵的是，應用於不匹配格式的架構可能會引發災難性的錯配。事實覆蓋率在4/6個數據集中低於無約束基準，這是通過實體膨脹或提取拒絕造成的。我們稱這一觀察到的模式為格式約束耦合。探測和標記消融支持基於列名引用的表面形式錨定解釋。在格式-架構配對、GraphRAG主機和LLM系列中的受控變體顯示在測量範圍內具有相同的方向；一個LLM系列僅顯示部分激活。這一觀察還具有診斷意義。三種標準檢索模式在很大程度上掩蓋了構建質量（增量<= 1pp），而直接圖形訪問揭示了高達+47.6pp的差距（p < 0.0001）。為了支持保真度意識的評估，我們發布了CSVFidelity-Bench。它包含15個數據集、11個型II矩陣、4個型III表格和6個領域中的1,892個金標準事實。
2605.21974.author: Jingxuan Qi et.al.
2605.21974.authors: Jingxuan Qi, Zhiqiang Ye, Yuxiang Feng
